nasb.text: And He will stretch out His hand against the north And destroy Assyria, And He will make Nineveh a desolation, Parched like the wilderness.

esv.text: And he will stretch out his hand against the north and destroy Assyria, and he will make Nineveh a desolation, a dry waste like the desert.

cnv.text: 耶和華必伸手攻擊北方， 毀滅亞述， 使尼尼微變成荒場， 乾旱像曠野。

ccb.text: 祂必伸手攻击北方，毁灭亚述， 使尼尼微一片荒凉， 如干旱的旷野。
